scripts.format: concurrently "prettier packages --write --cache --cache-location .cache/prettier/packages.cache --ignore-unknown" "prettier showcase --write --cache --cache-location .cache/prettier/showcase.cache --ignore-unknown" "prettier showcase-v2 --write --cache --cache-location .cache/prettier/showcase-v2.cache --ignore-unknown" "prettier package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml README.md eslint.config.cjs tsconfig.base.json .prettierrc.cjs --write --cache --cache-location .cache/prettier/root.cache --ignore-unknown"
scripts.format:check: concurrently "prettier packages --check --cache --cache-location .cache/prettier/packages.cache --ignore-unknown" "prettier showcase --check --cache --cache-location .cache/prettier/showcase.cache --ignore-unknown" "prettier showcase-v2 --check --cache --cache-location .cache/prettier/showcase-v2.cache --ignore-unknown" "prettier package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml README.md eslint.config.cjs tsconfig.base.json .prettierrc.cjs --check --cache --cache-location .cache/prettier/root.cache --ignore-unknown"
